heading: Recognition of private contributors to Forest Service programs
label: 556h Recognition of private contributors to Forest Service programs
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, on and after , any appropriations or funds available to the Forest Service may be used to disseminate program information to private and public individuals and organizations through the use of nonmonetary items of nominal value and to provide nonmonetary awards of nominal value and to incur necessary expenses for the nonmonetary recognition of private individuals and organizations that make contributions to Forest Service programs.October 21, 1998
